pi_items.source: Verified as real commercial office building via web search. Property records show this is Princeton Point, a Class A office building with multiple tenants. Located in Plainsboro Township but uses Princeton mailing address.

instrument_data.json iq_requirements.iq_tests contains 6 test items: IQ-001 (Receipt/Documentation), IQ-002 (Environmental), IQ-003 (Physical Installation), IQ-004 (Software), IQ-005 (Firmware), IQ-006 (Safety)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an Installation Qualification (IQ) Protocol document for a Waters ACQUITY UPLC H-Class chromatography system at NovaBridge Pharmaceuticals, Inc. in Princeton, NJ. The Waters ACQUITY UPLC H-Class is a real instrument system with documented specifications including Quaternary Solvent Manager, Sample Manager SM-FTN, Column Manager, and Tunable UV Detector. The regulatory framework references are genuine: 21 CFR Part 211 (FDA cGMP regulations), USP <1058> (Analytical Instrument Qualification official standard), ICH Q2(R1) (international harmonization guideline), and FDA 2015 Guidance on Analytical Procedures and Methods Validation. The facility address (600 College Road East, Princeton, NJ 08540) is a real commercial office building. The document must contain minimum 5 Heading 1 sections, 6 Heading 2 subsections, 3 tables, 25 paragraphs, a Table of Contents, and footer with page numbers. The protocol must reference 6 specific IQ test items documented in the instrument_data.json file.
